name: JoAi: Respond to Hook

description.en: Approve or deny an external runtime hook request (e.g. a tool permission request from Claude Code).
description.de: Genehmige oder verweigere eine externe Laufzeitanfrage (z.B. eine Werkzeugberechtigung von Claude Code).
description.es: Approve or deny an external runtime hook request (e.g. a tool permission request from Claude Code).
description.fr: Approve or deny an external runtime hook request (e.g. a tool permission request from Claude Code).
description.ro: Approve or deny an external runtime hook request (e.g. a tool permission request from Claude Code).
description.it: Approve or deny an external runtime hook request (e.g. a tool permission request from Claude Code).

bot: Responds to a pending hook approval request. Used internally when the user approves or denies a permission request from an external runtime like Claude Code.
